caddieInsights.deltaAiCloser: Ukukhetha kwe-AI bekusondele kuphini ngamayadi angu-{{yards}} kunokwakho ngokuphakathi.
caddieInsights.deltaYouCloser: Ukukhetha kwakho bekusondele kuphini ngamayadi angu-{{yards}} kunokwe-AI ngokuphakathi.
caddieInsights.deltaTied: Ushintsho lwakho luphetha ebangeni elifanayo nephini njengoke-AI.
caddieInsights.pendingNote: Iziphakamiso ezingu-{{count}} zakamuva zilindele idatha yemiphumela.

loyalty.empty: Iklabhu yakho ayikakubhalisi ohlelweni lokwethembeka okwamanje.

myGolf.generalPlaySub: Faka imizuliswano evamile uphinde wakhe i-handicap
myGolf.handicapProfileSub: Buka umlando we-WHS Handicap Index yakho

locker.noAssigned: Awunalo ilokha. Joyina uhlu lokulinda ukuze waziswe lapho litholakala.
locker.lockerAvailable: Ilokha liyatholakala — xhumana nehhovisi lekilabhi ukuze uqinisekise ukwabiwa.

fittingSessions.empty: Azikho izikhathi zokulinganisa ezizayo noma eziqediwe.

notifLabels.pushDesc: Thola izexwayiso zesikhathi sangempela kudivayisi yakho
notifLabels.pushNeedApp: Faka uphinde uvule i-app ukuze unike amandla izaziso eziphushiwe
notifLabels.noPhone: Asikho isibalo socingo esibhaliwe — xhumana nomphathi wekilabhi yakho
notifLabels.memberDocumentsDesc: Thola isaziso lapho ilungu lilayisha umbhalo wokubuyekezwa
notifLabels.committeePeerDigestDesc: Ngithumelele i-imeyili nsuku zonke yesifinyezo sezimpendulo zontanga ekubuyekezweni kwehandikhepi

languageModal.title: Ulimi
languageModal.description: Khetha ulimi olukhetha kakhulu lokubonisa. Isi-Arabhu sifaka phakathi ukusekelwa kwesakhiwo sangakwesokunxele kuya kwesokudla.

scoringHistory.noHistoryDesc: Bhalisela umqhudelwano uphinde uthumele amaphuzu ukuze ubone umlando wakho lapha

withdraw.title: Hoxa emqhudelwaneni
withdraw.successWithRefund: Uhoxe emqhudelwaneni. Isicelo sokubuyiselwa imali sifakiwe futhi sizocutshungulwa umhleli.
withdraw.message: Uqinisekile ufuna ukuhoxa ku-"{{name}}"? Lesi senzo asikwazi ukubuyiselwa emuva. Uma ukhokhe imali yokungena, umhleli uzocutshungula imali yakho ebuyiselwayo.

errors.photoUploadFailed: Ihlulekile ukulayisha isithombe sephrofayela. Sicela uzame futhi.
errors.avatarSelectFailed: Ihlulekile ukukhetha i-avatar. Sicela uzame futhi.
errors.avatarPickerDesc: Khetha i-avatar enendikimba ye-golf — ayidingi ukulayishwa.

caddiePending.title: Iziphakamiso ezilindile
caddiePending.subtitle: Buyekeza zonke izinketho ze-AI Caddie bese umaka ukuthi yiliphi induku oyishaye ngempela.
caddiePending.errorAiOff: I-AI Caddie ivaliwe ku-akhawunti yakho. Vumela kabusha imvume ye-AI ku-Privacy ukuze usebenzise lesi sikrini.
caddiePending.saveErrorNetwork: Sicela uhlole uxhumano lwakho bese uzama futhi.
caddiePending.invalidDistanceMsg: Ibanga eliya phini kufanele libe inombolo phakathi kuka-0 no-400 wamayadi. Thepha Yeqa ukuze ulondoloze ngaphandle kwalo.
caddiePending.outcomeHint: Kuyazikhethela — ibanga eliya phini ngemva kokushaya kwakho, ngamayadi. Lisiza i-AI Caddie ukufunda ngokushesha.
caddiePending.noRecommendation: I-AI ayinakho ulwazi olwanele ukuphakamisa induku.

badges.shareMessageLockedProgress: Sengisondele ekutholeni ibheji ye-“{{label}}” {{icon}} ku-KHARAGOLF — {{current}} kwa-{{target}}! {{url}}
badges.title: Amabheji
badges.signInToView: Ngena ngemvume ukuze ubone amabheji akho.

commPrefs.intro: Khetha indlela iklabhu yakho engaxhumana ngayo nawe ngesihloko ngasinye. Ungakhetha ukungafaki ekumakethweni ngokuphelele kuyilapho usaqhubeka uthola izibuyekezo zesevisi.
commPrefs.whatsappFootnote: Imilayezo ye-WhatsApp ithunyelwa kusukela kunombolo ye-WhatsApp Business eqinisekisiwe yeklabhu — kusebenza imithetho yenkampani yokuthwala ye-MSG91.

operations.label: Imisebenzi
operations.description: Ukuvalwa kwenkambu, isimo sezulu, nezexwayiso zokusebenza.

newsletters.label: Iziphephandaba
newsletters.description: Iziphephandaba ezithumelwa ngezikhathi ezithile yiklabhu yakho.

privacy.label: Ubumfihlo nezomthetho
privacy.description: Izaziso eziyimpoqo zokuvikela idatha (isb. izicelo zobumfihlo). Ngaphakathi kohlelo ne-imeyili kuhlala kuvuliwe; khetha ukuthi ufuna nokuthola usukelo ne-SMS noma cha.

emailOptOuts.sectionDescription: Lungisa ama-imeyili wezombhalo ngayinye ngokungenisi sigaba sonke sokukhokha.
emailOptOuts.dataExportExpiringLabel: Ngithumele i-imeyili lapho ukukhipha kwedatha kuzophelelwa yisikhathi
emailOptOuts.dataExportExpiringDesc: I-imeyili yesikhumbuzo izinsuku ezimbalwa ngaphambi kokuthi isixhumanisi sokulanda kokukhipha kwedatha siyeke ukusebenza.
emailOptOuts.sideGameReceiptsDesc: Amarisidi nge-imeyili lapho omunye umdlali equkethe nawe ibhethi yomdlalo we-side ongayisilo elemfanelo.
emailOptOuts.manualEntryDesc: Ukuphusha kanye ne-imeyili lapho umjikelezo womncintiswano uvalwa owawufakwe ngesandla cishe wonke. Ubonwa kuphela ngabaqondisi bomncintiswano namalungu ekomidi.
emailOptOuts.coachPayoutDesc: I-imeyili lapho i-akhawunti yokukhokha komqeqeshi yenziwa noma ibuyekezwa, ithunyelwa kubaphathi benhlangano njengesignali yokuphepha.
emailOptOuts.adminPayoutReverifyLabel: Izaziso zokuqinisekisa kabusha kwabaphathi okwentela ukukhokhwa
emailOptOuts.adminPayoutReverifyDesc: I-imeyili lapho umphathi wenhlangano eqinisekisa kabusha i-akhawunti yakho yokukhokhelwa ngesandla. Izimele kuvale lokukhokhelwa okubanzi ngezansi — ukuyivala lokhu kuthulisa kuphela isaziso senhlonipho yomphathi futhi kushiya izimakethe zokukhokhelwa ne-imeyili ye-cron ethi 'idinga ukunakwa' kungathintekanga.
emailOptOuts.adminPayoutReverifyTipBody: Bafundisi: le-imeyili yenhlonipho yomphathi manje inomshini wayo wokuyivumela. Thulisa kuphela lezi zaziso ngaphandle kokuthulisa ezinye ama-imeyili akho weBhilingi.
emailOptOuts.erasureStorageDigestDesc: I-imeyili yansuku zonke kumalawuli ebala amalungu ukususa kwawo i-akhawunti okushiyile amafayela esitoreni sezinto.
emailOptOuts.erasureStorageDigestPushLabel: Isifinyezo sokuhlanza ukususa okubambekile — ngaphakathi kohlelo / sukela
emailOptOuts.erasureStorageDigestPushDesc: Izaziso zansuku zonke ezingaphakathi kohlelo nezaziso zokusukela kumalawuli ebala amalungu ukususa kwawo i-akhawunti okushiyile amafayela esitoreni sezinto. Kuzimele kusuka kushintshi we-imeyili olungenhla — thulisa ishaneli eyodwa ngaphandle kokuthinta enye.
emailOptOuts.erasureStorageStatusBothMuted: Kokubili kuthuliswe — izexwayiso zizovela kuphela kulogi yokuhlola
emailOptOuts.erasureStorageBothMutedHint: Qaphela: ukukhuphuka kwezinga le-org kusathembele okungenani kushaneli elilodwa elifika kuwe. Uma kokubili kuthuliswe, uzobona izexwayiso ezintsha zokususa okubambekile kuphela uma uvula ilogi yokuhlola.

keyPrefs.sectionTitle: Ngokwesaziso: ngesikhathi sangempela vs. isifinyezo sansuku zonke
keyPrefs.sectionDescription: Khetha ukuthi sonke isaziso esinokuhlanganiswa sifika kanjani kuwe. Isikhathi sangempela sithumela ngokushesha; Isifinyezo sansuku zonke sisigcina kuze kufike i-imeyili yesifinyezo elandelayo.
keyPrefs.digestModeSuffix: . Izinketho ezingezansi zinqaba lokhu ngezaziso ngazinye.

notificationKeys.booking.reminder.24h: Isikhumbuzo sesikhathi se-tee, amahora angu-24 ngaphambili
notificationKeys.booking.reminder.2h: Isikhumbuzo sesikhathi se-tee, amahora ama-2 ngaphambili
notificationKeys.booking.waitlist.promoted: Uhlu lokulinda lukhuphule wena ngokuzenzakalelayo waya ekubhukheni okuqinisekisiwe
notificationKeys.caddie.mode.blocked: Isicelo se-AI Caddie sivinjelwe yimodi yomjikelezo
notificationKeys.coach.payout.account.changed.admin: Iakhawunti yokukhokha yomqeqeshi yakhiwe noma ibuyekeziwe (isexwayiso sokugada somlawuli)
notificationKeys.coach.payout.account.changed.coach: I-akhawunti yakho yokukhokha komqeqeshi yakhiwe noma ibuyekeziwe (isexwayiso sokuvikeleka)
notificationKeys.coach.payout.account.needs_attention: Ukuqinisekiswa kabusha kwesikhathi esithile kwe-akhawunti yokukhokha komqeqeshi kuhlulekile
notificationKeys.coach.review.delivered: Umqeqeshi wakho ulethe ukubuyekezwa kokuzungeza okungahambisani ngesikhathi
notificationKeys.coaching.gap.closed: Uvale igebe lokuqeqesha kwenduku ethile (umkhuba wokusondelana-vs-itour uthuthukile)
notificationKeys.handicap.exceptional.score: Ukunciphisa kwehandikepi ngenxa yamaphuzu amahle kakhulu kuye kwasetshenziswa
notificationKeys.levy.ledger.digest.failed: Isifinyezo se-CSV sencwadi yokulodi ngabili kwemali yenkokhelo asikwazanga ukulethwa noma sime ngenxa yabamukeli ababuyiselwa
notificationKeys.levy.ledger.org.digest.failed: Isifinyezo se-CSV sencwadi yokulodi ehlanganisiwe yamakilabhu sonke asikwazanga ukulethwa noma sime ngenxa yabamukeli ababuyiselwa
notificationKeys.levy.reminders.digest.failed: Isifinyezo sezikhumbuzo zenkokhelo ezibuyiselwa asikwazanga ukulethwa kunoma ngubani umamukeli ongumlawuli
notificationKeys.notify.exhaustion.admin_digest.failed: Isifinyezo sosuku semizamo yokuphela kwamandla salomlawuli asikwazanga ukulethwa kunoma ngubani umamukeli ongumlawuli wenhlangano
notificationKeys.privacy.erasure.storage_failures.control: Isifinyezo sansuku zonke somlawuli: ukususwa kwama-akhawunti amalungu kushiye amafayela esitoreji se-objects
notificationKeys.side_game.receipt.digest.failed: Isifinyezo samaresidi omdlalo oseceleni avalelekile asikwazanga ukulethwa noma sime ngenxa yabamukeli ababuyiselwa
notificationKeys.tournament.cut.applied: Umugqa wokusika usetshenzisiwe; ukuhlanganisa komjikelezo wesi-3 sekushicilelwe
notificationKeys.tournament.override.applied: Umlawuli wekilabhu usebenzise ngobuningi okumiselwe kokwaziswa okubhalele phezu kwesethi yalomqhudelwano
notificationKeys.verified.handicap.expiring: Ibheji yakho ye-handicap-eqinisekisiwe izophelelwa yisikhathi maduze
notificationKeys.wallet.payout.account.needs_attention: Ukuqinisekiswa kabusha kwesikhathi esithile kwe-akhawunti yakho yokukhokha kwesikhwama kuhlulekile
notificationKeys.wallet.refund.digest.failed: Isifinyezo se-refund eyenzeka yodwa yesikhwama asikwazanga ukulethwa noma sime ngenxa yabamukeli ababuyiselwa
notificationKeys.wearable.reauth.required: Phinda unikeze imvume kudivayisi yakho egqokwayo

walletPayoutNeedsReverify.titleUpi: Londoloza kabusha i-UPI yakho ukuze uqhubeke nokukhipha imali
walletPayoutNeedsReverify.titleBank: Londoloza kabusha i-akhawunti yakho yasebhange ukuze uqhubeke nokukhipha imali
walletPayoutNeedsReverify.body: Ukuhlolwa kabusha kwakamuva esikuhlelile kwemininingwane yakho yenkokhelo egciniwe akuphumelelanga, ngakho ukukhipha imali kumisiwe okwesikhashana kuze kube usulondoloze kabusha.
